# Auto-Commit System

\




## Description



Commit 1: This is an automated daily commit system.
Commit 2: It runs automatically at 9:00 AM every day.
Commit 3: No manual intervention needed - fully hands-off.
Commit 4: Updates the README with daily progress.
Commit 5: Tracks day count automatically.
Commit 6: Pushes to GitHub every day.
Commit 7: Uses cron job scheduling.
Commit 8: Self-modifying and adaptive.
Commit 9: Perfect for building streaks and consistency.
Commit 10: Set it and forget it!
